attributes.name: Skill
attributes.summary: The Skill module defines the structure and presentation of a skill card, primarily representing a skill or capability that can include descriptive information, instructions, and associated commands. It provides a standardized way to display a skill's title, description, instructions, and a collection of commands, with visual components for embedded display. The module enables modeling, rendering, and organizing skills as card-based data, facilitating user interaction with detailed skill information and executable commands.
